title: Within Without II
full_description: Within Without II examines the subconscious through light art, music and modern dance, symbolising the transformation of the self through different states. Artist Nick Verstand's spectacular halo light ring — the centrepiece of the work — creates an immersive environment where performer and audience inhabit the same luminous space. The opening performance of Amsterdam Dance Event 2022 at Koninklijk Theater Carré.
ai_summary: Nick Verstand's immersive dance and light installation — using his iconic halo ring structure — opened Amsterdam Dance Event 2022 at Carré with a meditation on the subconscious mind: choreography, electronic music, and shifting fields of light that dissolve the boundary between performance and experience.
